[CLIENT FIRST NAME]:



While we appreciate the business your company, [CLIENT] has provided us, we believe our companies have reached a communicative impasse of which neither party is benefited.  As a result of this situation and based on the provisions of our Agreement, this letter shall serve as 30-days’ Notice of Termination of our working relationship.
